docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,603.24 FILED BY CORDOVA, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, QICHU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2023 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF VICTOR CORDOVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT QICHU HUANG IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORDOVA, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, QICHU $2,553.24 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,603.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE CHARGED. SERVED DEC-01-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, QICHU
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2023 - JUDGMENT.
